recommendations.title: Sir
recommendations.overview: A prosperous young Indian man falls in love with his servant, a widow with the dream of becoming a fashion designer.

recommendations.title: Tentacles
recommendations.genres: Horror, Romance, Science Fiction, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A young Los Angeles couple Tara and Sam fall head over heels into a new romance, entwining their lives—until their intimacy transforms into something terrifying.

recommendations.title: Love.com
recommendations.overview: It's a love story between a fashion blogger and a video game blogger. The beauty and the nerd.

recommendations.title: The Bitter Tears of Petra von Kant
recommendations.overview: Petra von Kant is a successful fashion designer -- arrogant, caustic, and self-satisfied. She mistreats Marlene (her secretary, maid, and co-designer). Enter Karin, a 23-year-old beauty who wants to be a model. Petra falls in love with Karin and invi

recommendations.title: Don't Blame Karma!
recommendations.overview: The travails of Sara, a frustrated fashion designer who blames karma for her bad luck. Fate will put her face to face with her sister, Lucy, who enjoys very different luck, and in a series of events and reunions that will lead her to make a radical d

recommendations.title: You've Got This
recommendations.overview: An ad creative and a successful exec have a great marriage — until he wants to be a dad just as her star is rising. Then he brings someone new home.

recommendations.title: Love at Second Sight
recommendations.overview: A man tries to make his wife fall in love with him again, after waking up in an alternate reality where she never knew him.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: How to Date Billy Walsh
recommendations.overview: Archie has been in love with his best friend Amelia for as long as he can remember. Just when he builds up the courage to declare his feelings, she falls head over heels for Billy Walsh, a new American transfer student.

recommendations.title: I Feel Pretty
recommendations.overview: A head injury causes a woman to develop an extraordinary amount of confidence and believe she's drop dead gorgeous.
